---
title: "GA4 Analytics Engineering with R, Arrow & DuckDB & Parquet"
subtitle: "A practical guide to downloading, storing, and analyzing Google Analytics 4 event data"
listing: 
    contents: 
        - "*.qmd"
        - "!index.qmd"
        - "!draft-*.qmd"
    type: grid
    fields: [title, description, categories]
    sort: "order"
---

A practical guide to downloading, storing, and analyzing Google Analytics 4 
event data using modern R tools — from BigQuery extraction to high-performance 
local analysis.

## Tools

`R` · `Quarto` · `bigrquery` · `arrow` · `duckdb` · `dplyr` · `purrr`
